subject: [For Ian's approval] Local Movement from CNCB to Reg CB CN SIP - Linda Sun

content.answer:
Hi Ian,


As aligned with Shuning, we would like to seek your approval for Linda Sun
to move from CNCB to Reg CB CN SIP team starting from *1 Aug 2025*, pls
find the details below:


*Applicant’s Information and Current Role*

   - Full Name: Linda Sun
   - Department: CNCB
   - Team: China > Shopee > Cross Border > Business Development > Mass
   Seller Management > Mid Tail Seller Management > Fashion Cluster > WA, MA,
   KidsFashion
   - Rank: Manager
   - Reporting Manager: Sophie Peng
   - Location: CN
   - Group Joining Date: 31 May 2021
   - Tenure at Current Role: 4Y
   - Last Performance Grade: 2024, A-

New Role

   - Department: Regional Cross Border
   - Team: China > Shopee > Overseas Support > Singapore > Shopee > Cross
   Border > SIP
   - Rank: Manager
   - Reporting Manager: Cuiwei Sun
   - Location: CN
   - Transfer Date: 1 Aug 2025
   - Reason for movement:
      - Backfill for CN SIP team current lead Momo Chen (AM): who has
      resigned with the last day on 15 July due to personal reasons -
intended to
      take a break for health and rest
      - Linda will take on the CN SIP team scope, leading a team size with
      9 FTE and 21 BPO in CN
   - Proposed job scope for Linda:
      - [New scope 30k ADO] ERP (聚水潭) project seller management: ERP seller
      mass pitching/BD/MKT, onboarding and management; push seller co-investment
      - [Enlarged scope 25k ADO to 75k ADO] CNSIP seller management: CNSIP
      seller acquisition, onboarding and management; including seller
education,
      collaboration with CNCB RM; enquiry support; push seller co-investment
      - SIP marketing operations: ads management and optimization; campaign
      operations
      - SIP Ops: shop operations, order and customer service


For your review and approval to proceed. Thanks.

Best regards
*Max Xuyue*
Shopee | People Team
*Mobile/WhatsApp:* +65 9087 1831 | *Wechat:* 15322244581
*Address:* 1 Fusionopolis P

content.question:
ok
